title: LTM stock rating: CLSA bullish on AI-led revenue doubling target over 5 years; sees huge upside
description: CLSA maintained its Outperform rating on LTM (LTIMindtree) stock with a potential upside of 42 percent. The brokerage cited significant opportunities from artificial intelligence adoption and management's ambitious growth targets.

title: Officials turn to AI to speed up sexual assault claims
description: Department of Social Services officials says artificial intelligence is being used to speed up processing times for thousands of applications.
content:
Applicants in a national scheme aimed to restore justice for sexual abuse survivors are now having their claims processed by artificial intelligence.
Department of Social Services secretary Michael Lye said AI was being used to help make "faster deci... [1626 chars]

title: Thai civil service cutback plan in pipeline
description: The government plans to downsize its civil service through an early retirement scheme while increasing pay for remaining staff, as the administration accelerates its transition towards digital governance and artificial intelligence-driven public services.

title: SpaceX sets USD 135 share price for world's largest IPO, valuing at USD 1.77 trillion
description: SpaceX set a price for its initial public offering at USD 135 a share, positioning Elon Musk's rocket and artificial intelligence company to exceed the 2019 initial public offering of Saudi Aramco in both valuation and money raised.

title: Alphabet Raises $45 Billion In Oversubscribed Equity Offering To Fund AI Push
description: The fundraising comes as Alphabet ramps up spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure, cloud computing and advanced AI models amid intensifying competition in the sector.
content: As the global AI push continues, Alphabet, one of the largest companies in the world and the parent company of Google, has raised around $45 billion through its latest equity offering, with another $40 billion to be raised through an 'at the market' ... [1172 chars]

title: Thailand's 1.6-bil-baht AI gamble: Bold vision or costly leap of faith?
description: BANGKOK: It is rare for a government technology project to generate controversy before a single user has logged in. Yet TH-AI Passport — Thailand's 1,621-million-baht scheme to distribute pro-grade artificial intelligence access to five million citizens — has managed precisely that.

content:
